title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1521 - Initiating and responding tribunal of state
text:
454.1521.  Initiating and responding tribunal of state. — Under sections 454.1500 to 454.1728, a tribunal of this state may serve as an initiating tribunal to forward proceedings to a tribunal of another state and as a responding tribunal for proceedings initiated in another state or a foreign country.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
